Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants To Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant JASMINDER SINGH BANGA in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF THOMAS MCGRATH's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants To Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court notes defendant Mr. Banga did not timely contest the Court's tentative ruling, and that Mr. Banga's opposition was filed only yesterday, and, therefore, must be disregarded.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion is granted. No opposition filed. The Court finds the objections asserted by defendants to their respective Form Interrogatories are wholly without merit. Defendant Airspace Systems, Inc. shall provide code-compliant verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories 2.1, 2.5, 3.1, 15.1, 50.1, 50.3, 50.4, 50.5, and 50.6 within 14 days of service of entry of this order. Defendant Jasminder Singh Banga shall provide code-compliant verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories 2.1, 2.5, 2.8, 2.9, 2.10, 15.1, 50.1, 50.3, 50.4, 50.5, and 50.6 within 14 days of service of entry of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanction is also granted in the amount of $3,660.00 against Defendants Airspace Systems, Inc. and Jasminder Singh Banga, jointly and severally, payable within 14 days of service of entry of this order.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
